title: Environment essentials
description: Useful words for climate, pollution, and sustainability topics.

items.meaning: to take action that reduces harm to nature
items.example: Recycling is only one small way to protect the environment.
People can reduce waste by reusing everyday items.

items.meaning: materials from nature such as water, forests, and fuel
items.example: We should use natural resources more carefully.

items.meaning: harm done to nature and ecosystems
items.example: Air pollution causes serious environmental damage.

items.meaning: a long-term solution that does not harm the future
items.example: Public transport can be a more sustainable solution than private cars.

items.meaning: to help more people understand a problem
items.example: Schools should raise awareness about climate issues.
